word: H2554 - חָמַס - châmaç - khaw-mas' - Make bare

sections.paragraph:
Original: חמס

Transliteration: châmas

Phonetic: khaw-mas'

BDB Definition:

  1. to wrong, do violence to, treat violently, do wrongly
    1. (Qal) to treat violently, do wrong
      1. of physical wrong
      2. of ethical wrong
      3. of physical and ethical wrong
    2. (Niphal) to be treated violently

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: TWOT- 678

Part(s) of speech: Verb
